email_draft.subject: AI procurement & GTM growth at Lio
email_draft.body: Hi Lia, congrats on joining Lio. It’s an impressive leap from Wemolo, especially moving into the a16z-backed multi-agent AI space. I’ve been following the shift toward autonomous procurement and would love to hear your perspective on how the GTM team is scaling this. I’m currently exploring [Relevant Strategic Project/Innovation] and think there’s some interesting alignment between your focus on high-stakes growth and our current trajectory. Do you have 15 minutes next week for a brief exchange on market strategy?

linkedin_inmail.body: Hi Lia, massive congrats on the move to Lio! Seeing you transition from Wemolo into a16z-backed AI procurement is a great trajectory. Would love to connect and trade notes on GTM strategies for high-growth tech environments. Best, [Your Name]

high_resonance_topics: Scaling AI-driven sales and growth initiatives
The intersection of economic research and commercial application
Building high-velocity team cultures in Series A startups
topics_to_avoid: Slow-moving bureaucratic or legacy corporate projects
Stagnant operational maintenance without growth components

conversation_starters.opener: How are you balancing the shift from your academic focus at Nova to the rapid-fire pace of a $30M Series A?
conversation_starters.context: Validates her career dual-pathing and high-pace energy.

conversation_starters.opener: I saw your note on the multi-agent AI procurement shift—how are you currently prioritizing GTM channels given the early-stage nature of the product?
conversation_starters.context: Demonstrates respect for her current role and invites strategic collaboration.

conversation_starters.opener: Having seen your background at both BMW and high-growth startups, how do you think 'innovation' differs when it comes to long-term commercial impact?
conversation_starters.context: Leverages her previous institutional experience and appetite for growth.
